reference: IT WAS IN THE FEMALE LINE AS BASIL RANSOM HAD WRITTEN IN ANSWERING HER LETTER WITH A GOOD DEAL OF FORM AND FLOURISH HE SPOKE AS IF THEY HAD BEEN ROYAL HOUSES
text: It was in the female line, as Basil Ransom had written in answering her letter with a good deal of form and flourish. He spoke as if there had been royal houses.
